title: Old Screen
description: Changed the Carved Pumpkin to a 3D Model of an old screen when named "Screen" in an anvil.
body:
![To remodel an item, rename a carved pumpkin in an anvil to Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfb73a938a78421ed03b47e445c005e53d0247c7.png)This mod replaces the Carved Pumpkin with 3D model of Old Screen, available through renaming.

**Required mods**
- [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home): Required for custom item textures and emissive textures.
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions): Required for custom item textures when using fabric.
